hints.text: Pacific island nation NE of Brisbane (between Solomon Islands, New Caledonia & Fiji); all coverage = **Gen3 trekker**
Volcanic island → **dark volcanic soil**; tropical, much of the coverage in **dense tropical forest**
Of 13 main islands, **only Ambrym Island** has coverage — find the 'Port Vato' label north of Port Vila

**Trekker route west→east**: unique **volcano trekker** mid-island; plateau w/ dark brown soil + patchy grass; jungle w/ ferns + **man in a red cap**; **black-sand beach** on the east side; dirt road w/ tyre tracks + slightly purple soil east of the beach
**Endu Pahakol** = the only covered village: small **thatched huts** + dark soil
